description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy with a simple, rounded body and two prominent, pointed ears on top of its head, giving it an animal-like appearance. The surface is textured and appears to be made of a soft, fabric material in a uniform beige or light brown color. The toy has two small, round, dark eyes set widely apart on its face, but no visible mouth, nose, or other facial features. Its arms and legs are short and slightly rounded, with the limbs attached directly to the torso without distinct hands or feet. The overall form is chubby and symmetrical, with a slightly oversized head compared to the body. The toy's design is minimalistic, with no visible clothing, accessories, or additional decorative elements.
description: A soft, beige stuffed toy with a rounded body, pointed ears, and simple dark eyes. The design is minimalistic and animal-like, with no visible clothing or accessories.
description_view_0: The back view shows the rounded head, pointed ears, and the simple, unadorned back of the toy with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the profile of the head, the protruding ear, and the rounded body, with one eye and the arm and leg on this side visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays both dark eyes, the symmetrical face, and the full frontal shape of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, ear, and the side of the body with one eye visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: generic cartoon animal with pointed ears
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with two small, round, black eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and expressionless appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly extended outward and legs straight, the head facing forward.
